positive: A minimalist and highly stylized representation of a cosmic wave breaking over an ethereal landscape. The wave should be composed of glowing bioluminescent flora and crystalline structures, featuring shades of deep indigo, vibrant turquoise, and nebula purple. The composition should be central, featuring strong, clean silhouettes of stylized ancient forest trees rising from the wave's crest and falling into the foreground. High contrast, volumetric lighting from the cosmic source, designed with clean lines and clear divisions suitable for textile printing. Graphic novel art style meets Art Deco geometry, on a solid background for easy cropping.
